title: March 24
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 24''' is the 83rd day of the year (84th in leap years). There are 282 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Bob Mackie]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Matthew Sloan]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 48|''Star Wars'' (1977) 48]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Jason Wong]] is born.
*[[1990]] – [[Keisha Castle-Hughes]] is born.
*[[1999]] – [[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 3|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 3]] published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 24]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Outcast]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Boba Fett]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]'' released in digital format.
*[[2021]] – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 4|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 4]] published.
*2021 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 8|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 8]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories—Codebreaker (trade paperback)]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: Tales From the Nightlands (hardcover)]]'' to be published.
